evals.prompt: Add a new category called 'Church' with a teal color scheme
evals.expected_output: Category added to utils.ts constants and tailwind.config.ts
expectations: CATEGORY_COLORS in src/lib/utils.ts has a teal-themed class for Church
CATEGORY_CHART_COLORS has a teal hex color for Church
tailwind.config.ts has a church color entry

evals.prompt: The queue page should show a count of how many contacts are overdue in the page title
evals.expected_output: Queue page updated to show overdue count in heading
expectations: The overdue count is displayed in the page heading
The count comes from the existing Prisma query

evals.prompt: Add a bulk snooze feature that lets me snooze all overdue contacts by 3 days
evals.expected_output: New API endpoint and UI button for bulk snooze
expectations: A mechanism exists to update multiple contacts' nextDue dates at once
The snooze adds days to nextDue without changing lastContact
The UI provides a way to trigger the bulk action
